message:
feat(core,tools): normalize agent names to PascalCase across all entry points

Add normalize_agent_name() in models.rs that converts any case-variant
of a valid adjective+noun agent name to canonical PascalCase (e.g.
"bluedog" -> "BlueDog"), returning None for invalid names.

Refactor register_agent() and create_agent_identity() to use the new
normalizer + detect_agent_name_mistake() pattern, replacing ~35 lines
each of verbose validation with a compact flow. Empty strings now
auto-generate a name; legacy_tool_error simplified to 1-argument form.

Normalize agent names in all contact operations (resolve_or_register_sender,
request_contact, respond_contact, list_contacts, set_contact_policy) and
in resolve_or_register_agent() for messaging, preventing case-sensitivity
bugs where "bluelake" vs "BlueLake" would fail or create duplicates.

The tool_util module now normalizes agent name input before placeholder
detection and validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
